queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the risk-mitigating effects of negative checking account balances on borrower default likelihood and credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: An empirical examination of how minimal savings account balances correlate with lower credit risk exposure in retail banking.
